name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.00: Payday billing portal goes live against the real API. Invoices via GET /invoices?customerId=<guid> (amount=amountIncludingVat, status UPPERCASE, invoiceDate/finalDueDate/paidDate); ledger derived from invoices alone (no /payments endpoint); kennitala→customer-id auto-resolved by scanning /customers; operator link saves report whether a Payday customer matched. Bilingual Billing page + debug probe retained.
